超過25%香港上市公司使用的財務會計軟件

Welcome to our website dedicated to Infor SunSystems implementation service in Hong Kong. We are a team of experts who specialize in providing businesses with innovative software solutions to help them manage their finances more efficiently and effectively.

Infor SunSystems is an industry-leading financial management system that has been designed to help organizations streamline their financial processes, reduce costs and improve overall business performance.

 

Our team of experts has been trained in the implementation, fitting, and consultation support of the SunSystems in Hong Kong, and we have a deep understanding of how it can be tailored to meet the unique needs of businesses here.

 

Our services include:

•    Implementation: Our team of experts will work closely with you to understand your business needs and design a customized implementation plan that will ensure a successful roll-out of SunSystem in your organization.

•    Fitting: We understand that every business is unique, which is why we offer fitting services that can help tailor SunSystem to meet your specific requirements.

•    Training: We offer comprehensive training to ensure that your staff is fully equipped to use SunSystem to its fullest potential.

•    Consultation Support: Our team of experts is always available to provide consultation support and guidance whenever you need it.

 

Our expertise in Infor SunSystem has made us one of the leading providers of financial management solutions in Hong Kong. Whether you're a small business owner or a large corporation, we can help you streamline your financial processes and improve your overall business performance.

Why Choose Infor SunSystems in HK?

 

Infor SunSystems is an industry-leading financial management system that offers a wide range of benefits to businesses. Some of the key benefits of using SunSystems in Hong Kong include:

 

- Flexibility: it is a flexible solution that can be customized to meet the unique needs of your business.


- Scalability: it is scalable and can grow with your business, ensuring that it can meet your needs as you expand.


- Integration: it can be integrated with other business applications, making it easy to share data across different departments.


- Reporting: it offers advanced reporting capabilities that provide real-time insights into your financial data, allowing you to make informed business decisions.


-  Security: it offers robust security features that help protect your financial data from unauthorized access.
 

 

Who use Infor SunSystems?

 

Some of the international organizations that use Infor Sun system including California State University-Stanislaus, Investopedia LLC, redhat Inc, blackfriarsgroup, Shell UK, Prudential Mutual Funds, Dai-ichi Life Insurance, World Vision, Aman.

 

Accor using the Sun System for more than 400 hotels in India, the Middle East, Africa and Turkey.

 

Fully localized Infor Sun System solution available in China, Vietnam & Thailand.

 

Sunsystem’s accounting solution In Kenya, Uganda, And Africa.

 

Of all the customers that are using Infor SunSystems, 19% are small (<50 employees), 44% are medium-sized and 37% are large (>1000 employees).
